title: Alias Bulldog Drummond
writer: J.O.C. Orton, Sidney Gilliat, Gerard Fairlie
actors: Jack Hulbert, Fay Wray, Ralph Richardson
plot: Bulldog Drummond is injured when his sabotaged car crashes and Jack Pennington agrees to masquerade as the sleuth. He is enlisted to help Ann Manders find her jeweler grandfather who has been kidnapped by a gang of crooks who want...
